content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Canary source, package, schema, parser, sanitizer, worker, and API versions with SLO, capacity, kill-switch, rollback, and handle evidence.

hints: For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Progressive Release model · Theory Feed Ts Progr…, name the reader, publisher, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, tenant, URL, unknown XML, runtime validation, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, PostgreSQL, Express, handle, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Ts Progressive Release precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Progressive Release model · Theory Feed Ts Progr…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 7252 during an inclusive cross-device research reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bind package, non-root container, health, migration ownership, compatibility, canary, and rollback evidence; failed, canceled, stale, and cross-tenant work must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Canary source, package, schema, parser, sanitizer, worker, and API versions with SLO, capacity, kill-switch, rollback, and handle evidence.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Progressive Release model · Theory Feed Ts Progr…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A successful container smoke justifies full rollout.

checks.description: The cumulative typescript portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: feed-ts-progressive-release-15r5cy.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-ts-progressive-release-15r5cy(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_feed_ts_progressive_release_15r5cy\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?releaseArtifacts < 6)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?inspectedArtifacts < 6 \|\| inspectedArtifacts > releaseArtifacts)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?healthStates < 4)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?rolloutFailures > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
